title: justicia hodgei
intro: Justicia hodgei, also known as Hodge's Justicia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory function. Justicia hodgei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
